creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Yes, it worked in both Firefox and Waterfox until … I'm not sure when, I'm not a frequent user of Google Photos. 

When I first found the bug I (stupidly) didn't keep a record, because I lazily imagined a problem with an extension … maybe a week or two ago. Then found it reproducible today in safe mode. 

Working in Waterfox 56.0.4.1 in normal mode (extended) on Mac OS X. 

I'll boot a Linux machine where I know Waterfox 56.0.* is not current, tell whether it's reproducible there.
